query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a young girl with long brown hair, freckles across her nose and cheeks, and dark eyes. She wears a dark sleeveless top with pink trim at the neckline. A bright light source behind her illuminates the edges of her hair against a dark background. She looks directly at the camera.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a young girl with long brown hair and freckles, rendered in muted, faded tones with low vibrancy. A bright backlight creates extreme overexposure around her hair, blowing out the background into a radiant halo against the dark surroundings. She wears a dark sleeveless top with pink trim and looks directly at the camera, her solemn expression and the somber tonal choices contributing to an atmosphere of unease and melancholy.
